name: Grand Marnier Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Navel oranges, seeds and zest removed (Navel oranges, seed, chop)
1/4 cup Grand marnier (3/4 cup Grand marnier)
1 cup Sugar (equal to cooked fruit) (Sugar equal to cooked fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the kumquats, oranges, and water in a glass bowl.
2. Cover and let stand in a cool place for 12 hours.
3. Pour into a medium saucepan.
4. Bring to a full, rolling boil over high heat.
5. Cook for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Remove from heat and stir in lemon zest (grated fresh lemon rind).
7. Measure the mixture and add an equal amount of sugar.
8. Return to a boil and cook, stirring frequently, for about 30 minutes.
9. When the mixture begins to gel, remove from heat and pour into hot sterilized jars.
10. Vacuum seal. Makes 6 1/2 pint jars.
